data.content: Implemented a clickable version badge that forces a version check on click, surfaces either 'Update now to v{version}' or 'Latest version installed', and adds Storybook interaction coverage for both click-driven outcomes. Validation in /Users/cartine/foolery-6aaf: bun run lint src/components/version-badge.tsx src/stories/version-badge.stories.tsx; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run test:storybook -- src/stories/version-badge.stories.tsx; bun run build. Note: bun run test:all is still blocked by an existing unrelated Storybook import failure in src/stories/beat-status-badge.stories.tsx.
